sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32 matrix unpack and internal signed two's-complement quantization using Q15 scale and zero-point.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matrix_multiply: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized values with INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization of INT32 accumulators back to packed IEEE-754 FP32 bit patterns using combined Q15 scales.
